title: Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game
description:
Water. Earth. Fire. Air.

Master the elements and clash as legendary characters in Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game.

Whether you're controlling the battlefield with earth bending, overwhelming opponents with relentless pressure, or out-maneuvering them with speed and precision, every fighter offers a distinct fighting style to learn and master.

Featuring hand-drawn 2D animation faithful to the series’ roots, Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game lets you experience the world of Avatar Legends like never before. Choose from 12 playable characters and go head-to-head across a variety of modes and features, including Offline & Online Versus, Story, Arcade, Training, Spectator, and an Art Gallery celebrating the history of the series.

Pre-Order Bonus:

Pre-order Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game to receive the following bonus content:

● Support Character Skin: Samurai Appa

An alternate skin for Appa, available for pre-orders only.

●Exclusive Colors

Access to exclusive color variants for Aang, Korra, Zuko, Katara, Toph, and Sokka.

●Year 1 Character Vote

Players who pre-order the Digital Deluxe Edition will be eligible to vote and choose the final character in the Year 1 Pass!

 

Deluxe Edition: 

The Deluxe Edition expands on the Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game Standard Edition experience, with premium content that pays homage to its art, music, and iconic fighters.

The Digital Deluxe Edition includes the full game, plus:

● Year 1 Pass

Adds five iconic characters over the course of the season: Iroh, Ty Lee, Lin Beifong, Bolin and the winner of the Year 1 Character Vote.

● Original Soundtrack

Explore the music of Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game with the complete digital soundtrack.

● Digital Artbook

Curated digital collection showcasing the hand-drawn style of Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game through character art, stages, and more. 

Standard Edition

● Hand-Drawn 2D Animation

Hand-drawn 2D animation faithfully brings characters and their unique fighting styles from Avatar: The Last Airbender, The Legend of Korra, and the expanded universe to life.

● A Wealth of Game Modes

Includes Story Mode, Arcade Mode, Offline & Online Play, Training Mode, Spectator Mode, an Art Gallery featuring never-before-seen concept art and much more! 

●Story and Arcade Mode

Experience an all-new, original story outlined by show creators, Michael Dante DiMartino and Tim Hedrick. Shape the fate of time and space in the main story mode, then dive into arcade runs featuring unique storylines for every playable character.

● Robust Training Mode

A powerful Training Mode equips players of all skill levels with advanced tools, including hitboxes, frame data, save states and more.

● Art Gallery

Explore never-before-seen original artwork from the show, honoring the history, characters, and world of Avatar.

● Easy to Pick Up, Impossible to Put Down

Anyone can start bending with simple, intuitive controls, perfect for quick matches with friends and family. Beneath the surface lies a deep fighting system rewarding technical prowess and creativity.

● Seamless Online Play

Battle players worldwide with rollback netcode and crossplay across multiple platforms. Ranked and Casual matches, lobbies, spectator mode, replays, and more ensure a competitive experience that feels great to play no matter where you are or who you’re fighting.

Gameplay Features

• Master Flow and Energy Point

Control the fight by using Flow to dash, evade, and outmaneuver opponents with high-speed mobility, then build Energy Points through skilled play to unleash enhanced special moves and powerful cinematic Super Arts that can turn the tide of battle.

• Support Characters

Choose from three support characters to accompany your fighter, each providing unique abilities that enhance different strengths and open up new strategic possibilities. Experiment with different combinations and discover the partnership that vibes with your style the most.
description_short: Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game is a fast-paced 1v1 fighter where you battle as your favorite characters from the Avatar franchise. Featuring hand-drawn 2D animation true to the series’ roots, proprietary rollback netcode, and full cross-play for smooth, competitive gameplay.
